things.name: Frauenkirche
things.description: Reconstructed Baroque church and symbol of reconciliation after WWII destruction

things.name: Zwinger Palace
things.description: Baroque masterpiece housing the Old Masters Gallery with Raphael's Sistine Madonna

things.name: Semperoper
things.description: One of the world's most beautiful opera houses on the Theatre Square

things.name: Green Vault (Gruenes Gewoelbe)
things.description: Europe's largest treasure chamber with Augustus the Strong's dazzling jewel collection

things.name: Bruhl's Terrace
things.description: The Balcony of Europe, an elegant promenade above the Elbe with Baroque buildings

things.name: Altstadt (Old Town)
things.description: Restored Baroque old town with magnificent palaces, galleries and churches

things.name: Dresden Transport Museum
things.description: Comprehensive collection of historic vehicles from locomotives to classic cars

things.name: Pillnitz Palace
things.description: Chinese-influenced Baroque summer palace of the Saxon electors on the Elbe

things.name: Moritzburg Castle
things.description: Spectacular Baroque hunting lodge on a lake surrounded by woods

things.name: Saxon Switzerland National Park
things.description: Dramatic sandstone rock formations including the iconic Bastei bridge
